Hodos is post quantum cryptography (PQC) algorithm developed by QNu labs with NIST PQC studies as reference.

Hodos (PQC) is based on NIST selected mathematical functions, which are far harder to backtrack as compared to the prime factorization and elliptic curve functions on which the current PKI is based on.
